creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-03-22 15:52:42 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-Data-SpreadPagination Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                      pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Perl module for page numbering and spread pagination. The object produced by
  Data::SpreadPagination can be used to create an easy to use spread pagination
  navigator. It inherits from Data::Page, and in addition provides methods to
  create a pagination spread, keeping pagenumbers displayed within a sensible
  limit.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Data-SpreadPagination/
  
  PR:             ports/110677
  Submitted by:   Sergei Vyshenski <svysh@pn.sinp.msu.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1125    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/textproc/p5-Data-SpreadPagination/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Data-SpreadPagination/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Data-SpreadPagination/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/textproc/p5-Data-SpreadPagination/pkg-plist (new)
